title: Editor demo
seoDescription: Example page built with the block editor — edit this in /admin.

blocks.heading: This shoule be working
blocks.body: Add new pages from /admin, stack different sections, and control font, weight, and size per block.

blocks.left: Use **Two columns** when you want a different layout on one page — for example, notes on the left and a longer story on the right.
blocks.right: Each column has its own typography settings. Change font family (Strawford or Knile), weight, and size from the editor without touching code.

blocks.heading: Welcomd to the new page
blocks.body: Open /admin on Netlify, create a new Page, pick sections, and publish.
